xpand":{"book_id":"7226178043402783796","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局无敌➕打造势力➕收徒➕爽文➕召唤➕称霸诸天➕半幕后➕无女主】
林东开局升级系统2.0版本获得无敌修为，成为逍遥宗主后，收徒混沌剑体，召唤四名大帝境的宗门护卫，宗门设施齐全，资源无穷无尽，从此一路称霸诸天万界……
【叮！恭喜宿主收徒成功，获得青铜级召唤卡，使用召唤卡，获得一名宗门护卫，实力：大帝境。】
【叮！恭喜宿主收徒成功，获得黄金召唤卡，砖石召唤卡，七彩召唤卡……
【叮！宿主称霸天武大陆，成为大陆第一势力，获得奖励：大道神塔！】
【恭喜宿主完成任务，开放宗门的一切资源，开放神兵冢、万药界、宗门秘境等。】
【恭喜宿主获得时空之塔，时空之塔：最高可改变时间流速万倍……】
数年后，林东再回首，有一尊禁忌势力坐落于天武大陆，称霸诸天寰宇，外门弟子至少祖神，看门的神兽都是主宰，俯瞰万古岁月，其名为逍遥宗。
某帝族老祖：什么？天香女帝说要和家族断绝关系，去逍遥宗当一名侍女？疯了吧，逍遥宗到底有什么？她非要去？
某圣地圣主：你在跟本圣开玩笑？这尊无敌大帝强者，在逍遥宗只是一名护卫？
祖龙：本座无敌于一个时代，纵横大千寰宇，可见林东后，才明白什么是真正的无敌者，只敢以老奴自居。
又名《开局神帝修为，打造无上势力》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e4df23ebf3bcef3e92c0971224669fec","author":"逍遥无敌","author_id":"","book_id":"7226178043402783796","book_name":"别人辛苦修炼，你开局直升神帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7226203464798634553","read_count":"32278","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1035954"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"465","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻
